name: seed corpus: F-1 /postmortem can ingest seed/postmortems/*.jsonl as historical examples shown to the user when drafting a new postmortem
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" --show-historical 2>out.txt && grep -E '12 historical postmortems available' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
